auth.label: App API Key
auth.description: OneSignal app API key used with the Authorization: Key header for app-scoped REST API requests. Find it in Settings > Keys & IDs for the target app: https://documentation.onesignal.com/docs/en/keys-and-ids

extraFields.label: App ID
extraFields.description: OneSignal app UUID sent as app_id on every request. Copy it from Settings > Keys & IDs for the target app: https://documentation.onesignal.com/docs/en/keys-and-ids

actions.name: cancel_message
actions.description: Cancel one scheduled OneSignal message by id.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for canceling one OneSignal message.

success.description: Whether OneSignal accepted the cancellation request.

outputSchema.description: The cancel message response returned by OneSignal.

actions.name: create_push_notification
actions.description: Create a push notification for the connected OneSignal app using one official targeting method.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

contents.description: Localized push notification body keyed by language code.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

headings.description: Localized push notification title keyed by language code.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

subtitle.description: Localized push notification subtitle keyed by language code.

included_segments.description: Segments targeted by this push notification.

additionalProperties.description: The alias values for one alias label.

include_aliases.description: Mapping of OneSignal alias labels to one or more alias values.

include_subscription_ids.description: Direct subscription ids targeted by this push notification.

items.description: One OneSignal filter or operator object.

filters.description: OneSignal filter objects used as the targeting method.

send_after.description: Scheduled delivery time string accepted by OneSignal.

url.description: Optional URL to open from the notification.

web_url.description: Optional web URL to open from the notification.

app_url.description: Optional app deep link to open from the notification.

data.description: Custom push data included in the message payload.

custom_data.description: Template personalization data included in the request.

content_available.description: Whether to set content_available for silent delivery.

inputSchema.description: Core OneSignal push notification fields. The connector injects app_id from the connected credential and allows additional official request keys.

anyOf.description: The response does not include this field.

external_id.description: The upstream external id when OneSignal returns it.

anyOf.description: The response does not include this field.

errors.description: OneSignal validation errors returned for the create request.

anyOf.description: The response does not include this field.

warnings.description: OneSignal warnings returned for the create request.

outputSchema.description: The create push notification response returned by OneSignal.

actions.name: get_message
actions.description: Retrieve one OneSignal message by id from the connected app.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one OneSignal message.

app_id.description: The OneSignal app UUID attached to the message.

name.description: The message name when OneSignal includes it.

queued_at.description: Unix timestamp when the message was queued.

send_after.description: The scheduled delivery time string returned by OneSignal.

completed_at.description: Unix timestamp when the message finished processing.

canceled.description: Whether the message has been canceled.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

contents.description: The localized message body returned by OneSignal.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

headings.description: The localized message title returned by OneSignal.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

subtitle.description: The localized message subtitle returned by OneSignal.

included_segments.description: Included OneSignal segments attached to the message.

excluded_segments.description: Excluded OneSignal segments attached to the message.

additionalProperties.description: The alias values for one alias label.

include_aliases.description: Mapping of OneSignal alias labels to one or more alias values.

include_subscription_ids.description: Included subscription ids attached to the message.

items.description: One OneSignal filter or operator object.

filters.description: OneSignal filter objects used as the targeting method.

url.description: The URL attached to the message.

web_url.description: The web URL attached to the message.

app_url.description: The app URL attached to the message.

data.description: Custom push data attached to the message.

custom_data.description: Template custom data attached to the message.

successful.description: The number of successful deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

failed.description: The number of failed deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

received.description: The number of received deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

errored.description: The number of errored deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

converted.description: The number of conversions recorded by OneSignal.

remaining.description: The number of remaining deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

platform_delivery_stats.description: Platform-specific delivery metrics returned by OneSignal.

outputSchema.description: A OneSignal message object returned by the upstream API.

actions.name: list_messages
actions.description: List messages from the connected OneSignal app.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return.

offset.description: Pagination offset for the message list.

kind.description: The OneSignal message kind filter: 0 for API-created, 1 for automated, or 3 for journey.

time_offset.description: The sequential time_offset token returned by OneSignal.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing messages from the connected OneSignal app.

total_count.description: Total number of messages matching the request.

anyOf.description: The response does not include this field.

time_offset.description: The sequential time_offset token returned by OneSignal.

anyOf.description: The response does not include this field.

next_time_offset.description: The sequential time_offset token returned by OneSignal.

app_id.description: The OneSignal app UUID attached to the message.

name.description: The message name when OneSignal includes it.

queued_at.description: Unix timestamp when the message was queued.

send_after.description: The scheduled delivery time string returned by OneSignal.

completed_at.description: Unix timestamp when the message finished processing.

canceled.description: Whether the message has been canceled.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

contents.description: The localized message body returned by OneSignal.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

headings.description: The localized message title returned by OneSignal.

additionalProperties.description: The localized text value for one language key.

subtitle.description: The localized message subtitle returned by OneSignal.

included_segments.description: Included OneSignal segments attached to the message.

excluded_segments.description: Excluded OneSignal segments attached to the message.

additionalProperties.description: The alias values for one alias label.

include_aliases.description: Mapping of OneSignal alias labels to one or more alias values.

include_subscription_ids.description: Included subscription ids attached to the message.

items.description: One OneSignal filter or operator object.

filters.description: OneSignal filter objects used as the targeting method.

url.description: The URL attached to the message.

web_url.description: The web URL attached to the message.

app_url.description: The app URL attached to the message.

data.description: Custom push data attached to the message.

custom_data.description: Template custom data attached to the message.

successful.description: The number of successful deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

failed.description: The number of failed deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

received.description: The number of received deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

errored.description: The number of errored deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

converted.description: The number of conversions recorded by OneSignal.

remaining.description: The number of remaining deliveries recorded by OneSignal.

platform_delivery_stats.description: Platform-specific delivery metrics returned by OneSignal.

items.description: A OneSignal message object returned by the upstream API.

outputSchema.description: The paginated message list returned by OneSignal.
